Registry / Terms / associated measuring instrument

associated measuring instrument

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #02049 · 6 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 4 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

4 distinct definitions across 6 publications. 2 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

2 identical202X2010
instrument connected to the calculator or the correction device for measuring certain gas properties, for the purpose of making a correction
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency
202X2012OIML R137:20123.1.902654pending
20102006OIML R 137-1:20062.1.1101934pending
2 identical2010202X
instrument for measuring certain measurands which are characteristic of the gas (temperature, pressure, calorific value, etc.) and which are used by the calculator with a view to making a correction and/or a conversion
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency
20102007OIML R 140:2007T.1.902049pending
202X2007OIML R 140:2007T.1.902049pending

2 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
202X2024OIML R049-1:20243.1.1102379
instrument connected to the calculator (3.1.4) or the correction device (3.1.7) for measuring a quantity, characteristic of water, with a view to making a correction and/or a conversion
pending
202X2022OIML R139-1:20223.2.1102866
instrument for the measurement of a quantity, other than the measurand, the value of which is used to correct or convert a measurement result [OIML V1:2013, 5.09]
pending
